name: Instapaper
description: Manage your Instapaper reading list: bookmarks, folders, highlights, tags, and article export

oneOf.description: Instapaper OAuth consumer secret (plaintext or env interpolation via ${VAR})

consumerKey.label: Consumer Key

consumerSecret.label: Consumer Secret
consumerSecret.help: Provided with your consumer key. Accepts a string, ${ENV_VAR}, or a SecretRef.
